title: Stabilize Studio preview cancellation behavior
goal: Make preview cancellation and restart behavior deterministic and reliable.

steps.text: Identify the exact cancellation and restart state transitions involved in preview loading.
Implement the smallest behavior-preserving correction to ensure consistent loading state after cancellation.
Replace timing-fragile test synchronization with deterministic async coordination using actor and continuation patterns.
Run focused and full verification checks and summarize residual concurrency risk.

acceptanceCriteria: Preview cancellation and restart behavior is deterministic
No semaphore-based coordination is introduced for async test synchronization when actor and continuation alternatives are practical
No agent may introduce or use @unchecked Sendable anywhere in code, tests, or tooling context unless explicitly approved by the repository owner for that exact change
Scope remains limited to reliability concerns

verification.text: Review diff to confirm no scope expansion
